title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York / Tel Aviv (Global, B2B SaaS)
description: Reporting to the CRO, the Head of Revenue Operations builds and scales the operational backbone of Finout's go-to-market engine. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Involves collaborating with globally distributed teams including the Tel Aviv HQ. A strategic leader-doer who can own executive strategy while building flows, dashboards, and data models.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, senior RevOps background aligns perfectly with Head of Revenue Operations role, B2B SaaS and Fintech expertise are direct fits, and deep Salesforce/analytics skills match core requirements. Tel Aviv HQ location is ideal given candidate's geographic preferences.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations opening and immediately thought of your background. Your 15+ years scaling GTM operations in high-growth B2B SaaS and fintech—particularly your expertise building revenue analytics and Salesforce infrastructure at scale—maps directly to what the CRO is building for Finout's globally distributed engine. Given you're already optimized for the Tel Aviv HQ structure, this feels like a natural next move.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: As RevOps Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations, you'll accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. Maintain territory mapping in CRM systems (Fullcast, Salesforce), partner with Sales leadership and Finance to optimize territory composition, and lead special projects like market expansion. Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations or Sales Strategy, deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills (Excel, SQL, BI tools like Tableau/Retool), and Salesforce proficiency.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps and GTM expertise directly aligns with this territory strategy and Salesforce-focused role. His data-driven mindset, pipeline forecasting background, and experience optimizing go-to-market models make him an excellent fit for accelerating revenue growth and seller productivity.
ai_opener: I've spent 15+ years building revenue operations frameworks in B2B SaaS, and Gong's commitment to data-driven territory strategy resonates deeply with my approach to scaling sales organizations. Your focus on seller productivity and territory optimization through Salesforce and advanced mapping is exactly where I've driven the most impact—I'd welcome exploring how my experience scaling GTM operations can accelerate Gong's growth trajectory.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Own the technical infrastructure powering Instrumentl's revenue engine in this builder role. You'll architect the CRM data model, integrate new data sources, and lead technical implementation of AI tools across sales processes. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, Marketing Operations, or GTM Systems at a B2B SaaS company, strong technical skills (SQL, complex workflows, APIs), hands-on CRM administration (HubSpot preferred, Salesforce acceptable), and data architecture/integration experience. US target salary band is $120,000–$170,000 plus equity.

I'd be interested in exploring how my background in complex data models and sales tech stack integration could accelerate your growth.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo is an AI research platform used by brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange. As GTM Engineer you'll replace patchwork SaaS tools and manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered automations that compound over time. Expect to build lead scoring models that learn, attribution pipelines that work, activation flows, and AI agents that eliminate manual work. You should be able to code, ship, and iterate on internal tools and automations to make the GTM team dangerously effective during 20x revenue scaling.

Good fit for a technical RevOps leader, but Omri should clarify if this leans more engineer/builder vs. operator/strategist.

Your vision of lead scoring models that learn and AI agents that kill manual work resonates deeply — curious if you're looking for someone to architect the RevOps layer that makes your GTM team's efficiency exponential.
